name: browser_scroll
description: Scroll the page, a scrollable container, or an element into view. Use this instead of CDP Input.* wheel events.

amount.description: Scroll amount in pixels. Defaults to 300.

scrollIntoView.description: When true, scroll the ref into view.

viewId.description: Target browser tab ID. If omitted, uses the last interacted tab.

take_screenshot_afterwards.description: When true, takes a screenshot after scrolling completes. Defaults to false.
